This page was generated using data obtained on 2023-09-27. Please, send me a message if you want it updated!




Proposed edits at this page are so obvious that automatic edit makes sense.
  • wikipedia tag unexpected language
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags
  • wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect
wikidata and wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because wikidata tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q104880292 vs Q11979050
John Sevier Fossil Plant - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( relation(12938182)['wikidata'='Q104880292']['wikipedia'='en:John Sevier Fossil Plant']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikidata redirect']


wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for brand prefixed tags
brand:wikidata and brand:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because brand:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed

wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags
operator:wikidata and operator:wikipedia tags link to a different objects, because operator:wikipedia tag points to a redirect that should be followed
Q3030410 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Disney Consumer Products and Interactive Media to en:Disney Consumer Products
H&M - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q8040120 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Wyndham Hotels and Resorts to en:Wyndham Hotels & Resorts
Days Inn - an affected OSM element that may be improved

Q8040120 vs (missing) article redirects from en:Wyndham Hotels and Resorts to en:Wyndham Hotels & Resorts
Days Inn - an affected OSM element that may be improved

overpass query usable in JOSM that will load all objects where this specific error is present:
[out:xml][timeout:3600]; ( node(5194291363)['operator:wikidata'='Q3030410']['operator:wikipedia'='en:Disney Consumer Products and Interactive Media']; way(659757431)['operator:wikidata'='Q8040120']['operator:wikipedia'='en:Wyndham Hotels and Resorts']; way(946725204)['operator:wikidata'='Q8040120']['operator:wikipedia'='en:Wyndham Hotels and Resorts']; ); (._;>;); out meta qt;//['wikipedia wikidata mismatch - follow wikipedia redirect - for operator prefixed tags']
